project: Ghana Emergency Preparedness, Warning & Disaster Response Platform
epic: EPIC 2: Geospatial Data And Risk Checker
notes: Imagery-service converted to the NADAA-171/172 modular package structure (cmd/server + internal/config|models|store|utils|handlers) with graceful http.Server shutdown, CORS/security headers, multipart drone/satellite/other image upload, metadata validation, local disk storage, authority list/detail/download/delete/expire endpoints, retention lifecycle runner, public GeoJSON FeatureCollection footprint, structured INFO/WARN/ERROR logging, tests, Dockerfile, README, CI matrix entries, live smoke:imagery, and full verification.
